# @platform/react-enterprise-app

Generic React 19 TypeScript enterprise application shell using generated GraphQL contracts through approved adapters.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/react-enterprise-app
Version: 0.1.0
Component: react-enterprise-app
Type: application
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: experience
Bounded context: app-shell
Owner: team-app
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: feature
Class: active.feature
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-app
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own the browser application shell, routing surface, runtime bootstrapping, and application-level composition
- Compose feature packages through public exports
- Consume data operations only through approved contract and adapter package boundaries
- Compose role-aware application surfaces for admin, staff, and user experiences

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own product-specific domain policy
- Does not define GraphQL schema or operation ownership
- Does not bypass package public exports or call vendor transport directly
- Does not own role policy definitions or permission evaluation

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Use as the generic enterprise React application entry package
- Import feature packages through their public exports
- Use generated GraphQL TypedDocumentNode operations through approved adapter packages
